pi_items.source: Inspected /tmp/first_run-demo/demo-production/alamano/entities.csv - entity not found in official demo data
Inspected /tmp/first_run-demo/demo-production/alamano/incoming_payments.csv - amount not found; existing amounts range from 1,679.92 to 4,263.89 EUR
Inspected /tmp/first_run-demo/demo-production/alamano/incoming_payments.csv - demo data dates range from 2019-01-31 to 2021-12-30; test date 2024-09-15 is future relative to demo data
Inspected /tmp/first_run-demo/demo-production/alamano/incoming_payments.csv - reference format not found; existing references follow patterns like '2019015026600', '202001', etc.
Confirmed in setup_task.sh (TENANT='demo') and manifest.yml (company: GAEC JOULIN in demo-production environment)

privileged_info_summary: The task scenario is based on a real farm (GAEC JOULIN in Saint-Porchaire, Charente-Maritime, France) from the official Ekylibre demo data repository. However, the specific payment details (payer entity, amount, date, and reference number) are synthetic test data created for this task. The Coopérative Agricole de Charente entity is not present in the official demo dataset but is created by the setup script if missing. The incoming payment values (8750.00 EUR, 2024-09-15) do not appear in the demo dataset. The tenant identifier 'demo' is verified.
